zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace de Tracy於1105年出生在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾時，她的父親William de Tracy20歲，母親Alice de Normandie25歲。她於1129年與John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1140年在英國格盧斯特斯爾文可姆享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace de Tracy于1105年出生在英国戴文巴恩斯塔普爾时，她的父亲William de Tracy20岁，母亲Alice de Normandie25岁。她于1129年与John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1140年在英国格盧斯特斯爾文可姆享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace de Tracy was born in 1105, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, her father, William de Tracy, was 20 and her mother, Alice de Normandie, was 25. She married John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington in 1129, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1140, in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace de Tracy est née en 1105, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William de Tracy, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice de Normandie, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington en 1129, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1140, à Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace de Tracy 1105 in Barnstaple, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Tracy 20 und ihre Mutter Alice de Normandie 25. Sie hat 1129 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1140 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace de Tracy è nata il nel 1105 nel Barnstaple, Devon, England, sua padre, William de Tracy, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice de Normandie, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington nel 1129, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1140, nel Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace de Tracyが1105年にイギリスデボンバーンスタプルで生まれた時，父William de Tracyは20歳，母Alice de Normandieは25歳であった。1129年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでJohn de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1140年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィンチコンベで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace de Tracy(이)가 1105년 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tracy(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Normandie(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1129년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 영국 그루스스터실르 윈ch코브에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace de Tracy nasceu em 1105, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Tracy, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Normandie, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington em 1129, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1140, em Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace de Tracy родилась в 1105 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Tracy было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Normandie, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington в 1129 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1140 г. в местности винчкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace de Tracy nació en 1105, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Tracy, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice de Normandie, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington en 1129, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1140, en Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
